mapper.select: SELECT room_id, player_id, order_no, janken_hand FROM janken_choice WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND player_id = #{playerId} ORDER BY order_no ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO janken_choice ( room_id, player_id, janken_hand, order_no, created_at ) VALUES
( #{c.roomId}, #{c.playerId}, #{c.jankenHand}, #{c.orderNo}, #{c.createdAt} )
